name: PinWolf
address: 1912 S Walton Blvd Unit A, Bentonville, AR 72712
about: PinWolf is an indoor golf simulator venue that provides both entertainment and game improvement services for the general public and golf enthusiasts. The facility features technology-focused environments with access to over 150,000 virtual golf courses. PinWolf operates a league system and offers coaching through Titleist Performance Institute (TPI) certified professionals. Services include simulator rentals, fitness sessions, and club fitting with data-driven analysis.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a massive library of 150,000+ virtual golf courses
Data-driven instruction using premium technology like Foresight Sports GC2+HMT and K-Vest/K-Motion software
Regular league play and weekly Skins competitions with cash prizes

food_and_drink.notes: No food allowed in the simulator room.
No drugs or alcohol on the premises.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end launch monitor with ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided, so it's advisable to bring your own set.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No food or drinks are allowed in the simulator room. No drugs or alcohol are permitted on the premises.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical round is not specified, but the venue offers 2-hour and 3-hour golf simulator sessions, suggesting an 18-hole round can be completed within this timeframe.

faq.question: Is PinWolf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information is provided regarding children's activities or facilities, but the environment appears geared toward adults, with a strict no-food/no-drink policy in the simulator room.
